about.title: Humanitec — your team of AI employees
about.subtitle1: A platform with business automation tools: AI agents, smart knowledge base, and contact management system. Freeing up time for growth.
about.subtitle2: Agents work 24/7, processing requests and communicating with clients.
about.subtitle_landing: A platform for automation and team work: AI agents, knowledge base, contact graph, Documents with collaborative Office editing, and Sync — chat with video calls and Git context. Freeing up time for growth.

features.ability_alt_documents: Documents and collaborative editing in Humanitec
features.feature1_description: Do not waste time and money building from scratch. Use ready-made services: create AI agents, collaborate in Sync, manage contacts in NetWorkle, store documents in Knowledge Base. Everything is configured and running.
features.feature1_li2: Launch your first agent in one day
features.feature2_description: No hidden fees or subscriptions. Start from 50 rubles and pay only for what you use. See every penny in detailed usage statistics.
features.feature3_description: Your agents work 24/7 without weekends or sick leave. They handle thousands of requests at once. Update logic on the fly without downtime.
features.feature4_description: All data stays in your database and is not shared with third parties. Full isolation between companies. Integrate with your systems via API.
features.feature5_description: Collaborative editing of Office files (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) on your document server: multiple people in one file, bindings per company and namespace; JWT and callbacks stay on the BFF only.
features.feature5_li1: Real-time co-editing in a familiar editor
features.feature5_li2: Open from the dashboard or apps menu; upload and empty templates via the API
features.feature5_li3: Time-limited JWT to hand the file to the editor securely

testimonials.tag: / Entrepreneurs and small businesses trust us
testimonials.author1_text: We focused not on one task, but on a whole cycle of tasks to implement filters for 60k+ typical questions, the second was a well-tuned script, then the assistant qualifies incoming calls and categorizes them. They take all the necessary initiatives. Thus, over the last 4-5 months, we have felt a decrease in the load on departments and an increase in customer loyalty. This includes investments in the business over the last year.
testimonials.author2_text: We automated not one task, but a whole cycle: a support agent filters 80% of typical questions, a second one tracks delivery statuses and informs clients, and a third prepares analytics on returns. They work as a single mechanism. The platform paid for itself in 3 months due to the reduced workload on departments and increased customer loyalty. The best investment in the business in the last year.
testimonials.author3_text: Integration with our CRM went smoothly. AI agents handle customer inquiries 24/7, which has significantly improved our service level. We are seeing an increase in sales and loyalty. This is the best investment in our business in the last year.
testimonials.slide1_text: Humanitec helped us automate client request handling. Our team can focus on the product while AI agents handle routine work. It paid off in the first month!
testimonials.slide2_text: We deployed an AI agent for orders and messenger inquiries. Service quality went up and response time dropped from hours to minutes. Customers are happy and sales are growing!
testimonials.slide3_text: Complex processes that once needed a dev team now run on Humanitec. The platform is flexible, reliable, and well supported. Highly recommended!

faq.slot1_q: What is AI Studio and how do I create an agent?
faq.slot1_a: AI Studio is a visual no-code builder for AI agents. You pick a use case (support, lead handling, consultations), configure behavior in a simple UI, connect channels (Telegram, WhatsApp, web), and launch. The agent works 24/7, answering clients and following your rules.
faq.slot2_q: What is Knowledge Base and why do I need it?
faq.slot2_a: Knowledge Base is a smart knowledge store with semantic search. Upload documents, guides, FAQs, price lists — the system indexes them automatically. Your AI agents find precise answers and respond using up-to-date content. Update a file once and the agent knows the new information.
faq.slot3_q: Which documents can I upload to Knowledge Base?
faq.slot3_a: Popular formats are supported: PDF, Word, Excel, plain text, Markdown. You can upload internal guides, knowledge bases, catalogs, price lists, policies, FAQs, and more. Content is split into meaningful chunks and indexed for fast search.
faq.slot4_q: What is NetWorkle and how is it different from a classic CRM?
faq.slot4_a: NetWorkle is a smart notebook that turns any data into a connected, searchable base. Unlike rigid CRM forms, you capture contacts, meetings, notes, and deals in free form; the system finds links and builds a relationship graph. Search by meaning, e.g. who you met last week or IT-sector contacts.
faq.slot5_q: How does NetWorkle help with customers?
faq.slot5_a: NetWorkle links everything: contact, meetings, notes, deals, calls. You see the full picture per client. Semantic search helps with questions like what you discussed with Ivan in December or who asked about product X — without manual linking.
faq.slot6_q: Can I use Knowledge Base and NetWorkle together with AI agents?
faq.slot6_a: Yes — that is the recommended setup. Agents pull answers from Knowledge Base and context from NetWorkle (client data, conversation history). For example, support finds an answer in the knowledge base and sees the client’s ticket history in one flow.
faq.slot7_q: What is Sync and why does a team need it?
faq.slot7_a: Sync is Humanitec’s team chat: channels, DMs, threads, and video calls with screen sharing. Engineering context can sit next to Git. Data is isolated per company; notifications help you not miss important updates.
faq.slot8_q: How is Sync different from a regular messenger?
faq.slot8_a: Sync is part of the platform: one login from the dashboard, same users and company as AI Studio, Knowledge Base, and NetWorkle. Repo integration for engineering teams, guest links for calls, and org-level access — not mixed personal and work chat.
faq.slot9_q: How safe is it to store data on the platform?
faq.slot9_a: Security is a priority. Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Choose cloud or on-premise for full control. Access control defines who sees what. Regular backups reduce the risk of data loss.
faq.slot10_q: Do I need technical skills to use the platform?
faq.slot10_a: No. Every service has a simple visual UI. Creating agents, uploading documents, working in NetWorkle, chat and calls in Sync — all without coding. For complex needs, our supported plan includes help tailoring everything to your processes.
